anti_claims: This skill JSON seed does not flip source authority away from the current skill markdown projection.
Resolved operated-standard and acted-on-kind edges are structural route mappings, not proof the skill is complete or used correctly by agents.
Absent mechanism or concept neighbours are residual pressure, not evidence that no such neighbours exist.
Generated graph, health, and atlas projections cannot be read back as source evidence.

omitted: mechanism or concept neighbours not named by typed source mapping
omission_receipt.reason: Skill instance preserves public-safe markdown source identity, digest, and typed route mapping only. JSON parity does not prove full skill-body completeness or runtime correctness.

residual_pressure.reentry_condition: Bind skill.uses mechanism and skill.applies concept edges only when source evidence names ids.

justification.summary: This markdown binds principle authoring to std_microcosm_principle, the principle doctrine kind, and the executable doctrine grammar mechanism because active principles must be admitted through source text and computed obligation support, not asserted from generated projections.

title: Microcosm Principle Author
triggers: A principle candidate needs governed admission rather than remaining prose pressure or an untyped downstream habit.
The agent can name source text, grounded axiom obligation, support calculus boundary, downstream-governance claim ceiling, and residual pressure if the governs edge is not evidenced.
workflow: Read std_microcosm_principle, PRINCIPLES.md, axiom support contracts, anti-principle guards, the relation registry, and generated health before editing.
Admit only source-backed principle rows or typed residual pressure; do not infer governs edges from broad thematic fit.
Regenerate the principle corpus and doctrine lattice, then run principle, axiom, standard, and broad projection checks before scoped commit.
